channel.title: K's Life • Posts by "程序语言" category
channel.description: 日常的一些记录，留作备忘！

item.title: Linux系统service服务管理方式下Nginx设置开机启动
Debian10系统systemclt服务管理方式下Nginx设置开机启动
Markdown写一些latex符号和符号用法
最小二乘法的算术推导
Python批量重命名
腾讯文字批量识别
item.description: <p>腾讯文字批量识别</p> <figure class="highlight python"><table><tr><td class="gutter hljs"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><span class="line">1</span><br><span class="line">2</span><br><span class="line">3</span><br><span class="line">4</span><br><span class="line">5</span><br><span class="line">6</span><br><span class="line">7</span><br><span class="line">8</span><br><span class="line">9</span><br><span class="line">10</span><br><span class="line">11</span><br><span class="line">12</span><br><span class="line">13</span><br><span class="line">14</span><br><span class="line">15</span><br><span class="line">16</span><br><span class="line">17</span><br><span class="line">18</span><br><span class="line">19</span><br><span class="line">20</span><br><span class="line">21</span><br><span class="line">22</span><br><span class="line">23</span><br><span class="line">24</span><br><span class="line">25</span><br><span class="line">26</span><br><span class="line">27</span><br><span class="line">28</span><br><span class="line">29</span><br><span class="line">30</span><br><span class="line">31</span><br><span class="line">32</span><br><span class="line">33</span><br><span class="line">34</span><br><span class="line">35</span><br><span class="line">36</span><br><span class="line">37</span><br><span class="line">38</span><br><span class="line">39</span><br><span class="line">40</span><br><span class="line">41</span><br><span class="line">42</span><br><span class="line">43</span><br><span class="line">44</span><br><span class="line">45</span><br><span class="line">46</span><br><span class="line">47</span><br><span class="line">48</span><br><span class="line">49</span><br><span class="line">50</span><br><span class="line">51</span><br><span class="line">52</span><br><span class="line">53</span><br><span class="line">54</span><br><span class="line">55</span><br><span class="line">56</span><br><span class="line">57</span><br><span class="line">58</span><br><span class="line">59</span><br><span class="line">60</span><br><span class="line">61</span><br><span class="line">62</span><br><span class="line">63</span><br><span class="line">64</span><br><span class="line">65</span><br><span class="line">66</span><br><span class="line">67</span><br><span class="line">68</span><br><span class="line">69</span><br><span class="line">70</span><br><span class="line">71</span><br><span class="line">72</span><br><span class="line">73</span><br><span class="line">74</span><br><span class="line">75</span><br><span class="line">76</span><br><span class="line">77</span><br><span class="line">78</span><br><span class="line">79</span><br><span class="line">80</span><br><span class="line">81</span><br><span class="line">82</span><br><span class="line">83</span><br><span class="line">84</span><br><span class="line">85</span><br><span class="line">86</span><br><span class="line">87</span><br><span class="line">88</span><br><span class="line">89</span><br><span class="line">90</span><br><span class="line">91</span><br><span class="line">92</span><br><span class="line">93</span><br><span class="line">94</span><br><span class="line">95</span><br></pre></div></td><td class="code"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><code class="hljs python"><span class="hljs-comment">#!/usr/bin/env python</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># -*- coding: utf-8 -*-</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Date : 2020-10-13 12:22:35</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Author : Your Name (you@example.org)</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Link : http://example.org</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Version : $Id$</span><br><br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> json<br><span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> tencentcloud.common <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> credential<br><span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> tencentcloud.common.profile.client_profile <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> ClientProfile<br><span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> tencentcloud.common.profile.http_profile <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> HttpProfile<br><span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> tencentcloud.common.exception.tencent_cloud_sdk_exception <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> TencentCloudSDKException<br><span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> tencentcloud.ocr.v20181119 <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> ocr_client, models<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> base64<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> os<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> time<br><br><span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br><span class="hljs-string">参考资料：</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> API 中心: </span><br><span class="hljs-string"> https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/866/33517</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> API Explorer:</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> https://console.cloud.tencent.com/api/explorer?Product=ocr&amp;Version=2018-11-19&amp;Action=GeneralBasicOCR&amp;SignVersion=</span><br><span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br><br><span class="hljs-comment">#获取开始时间</span><br>start = time.time()<br><br><span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">def</span> <span class="hljs-title">get_file_content</span>(<span class="hljs-params">filePath</span>):</span><br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(filePath)<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(filePath, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;rb&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> fp:<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> fp.read()<br><br><span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">def</span> <span class="hljs-title">write_on_txt</span>(<span class="hljs-params">content,filePath,linefeed = <span class="hljs-string">&quot;1&quot;</span></span>):</span><br> <span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> content：要写入的内容</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> filePath：要写入文件的路径</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> linefeed ：判断是否换行</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> - 1 为不换行 </span><br><span class="hljs-string"> - 其他 为换行</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> &quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment">#只需要将之前的”w&quot;改为“a&quot;即可，代表追加内容</span><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(filePath,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;a&quot;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> file:<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">try</span>:<br> file.write(content)<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">except</span>:<br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;写入错误&quot;</span>)<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">else</span>:<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> linefeed != <span class="hljs-string">&quot;1&quot;</span>:<br> file.write(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;\n&quot;</span>)<br><span class="hljs-comment">#图片路径</span><br>image_path = <span class="hljs-string">r&quot;G:\Pictures\jy\test&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># 或者&quot;G:/Pictures/jy&quot;格式</span><br><span class="hljs-comment">#文本路径</span><br>txt_path = <span class="hljs-string">r&quot;G:\Pictures\jy\OCR\图片.txt&quot;</span><br><br><span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> root,dirs,files <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> os.walk(image_path):<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> file <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> files:<br> <span class="hljs-comment"># 使用join函数将文件名称和文件所在根目录连接起来</span><br> file_dir = os.path.join(root, file)<br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(file_dir)<br> write_on_txt(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;=============================&quot;</span>,txt_path,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0&quot;</span>)<br> write_on_txt(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;文件名:&quot;</span>+ file_dir,txt_path,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0&quot;</span>)<br><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">try</span>:<br> cred = credential.Credential(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;腾讯 api 的 id&quot;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&quot;腾讯 api 的秘钥&quot;</span>) <br> httpProfile = HttpProfile()<br> httpProfile.endpoint = <span class="hljs-string">&quot;ocr.ap-chengdu.tencentcloudapi.com&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-comment">#就近地域接入（推荐，只支持非金融区），</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment">#其他格式：西南地区(成都) ocr.ap-chengdu.tencentcloudapi.com</span><br><br> clientProfile = ClientProfile()<br> clientProfile.httpProfile = httpProfile<br> client = ocr_client.OcrClient(cred, <span class="hljs-string">&quot;ap-guangzhou&quot;</span>, clientProfile) <span class="hljs-comment">#地域参数，用来标识希望操作哪个地域的数据</span><br><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(file_dir, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;rb&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> f: <span class="hljs-comment"># 以二进制读取本地图片</span><br> data = f.read()<br> encodestr = <span class="hljs-built_in">str</span>(base64.b64encode(data), <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;utf-8&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-comment"># base64编码图片 </span><br> params = &#123;<br> <span class="hljs-string">&quot;ImageBase64&quot;</span>: encodestr,<br> <span class="hljs-string">&quot;LanguageType&quot;</span>: <span class="hljs-string">&quot;auto&quot;</span><br> &#125;<br><br> req = models.GeneralBasicOCRRequest() <span class="hljs-comment"># 通用高精度：GeneralAccurateOCR；</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment"># 手写识别：GeneralHandwritingOCRRequest()</span><br> req.from_json_string(json.dumps(params))<br><br> resp = client.GeneralBasicOCR(req) <br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>()<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> text <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> resp.TextDetections: <span class="hljs-comment"># 输出文字</span><br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(text.DetectedText)<br> write_on_txt(text.DetectedText,txt_path,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0&quot;</span>) <br> <span class="hljs-keyword">except</span> TencentCloudSDKException <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> err: <br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(err) <br>end = time.time()<br><span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Running time: %1.2f Seconds&#x27;</span>%(end-start))<br><br></code></pre></div></td></tr></table></figure>

item.title: Asp操作MSSQL数据库,ajax处理
Python合并PDF
item.description: <p>代码如下：</p> <figure class="highlight python"><table><tr><td class="gutter hljs"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><span class="line">1</span><br><span class="line">2</span><br><span class="line">3</span><br><span class="line">4</span><br><span class="line">5</span><br><span class="line">6</span><br><span class="line">7</span><br><span class="line">8</span><br><span class="line">9</span><br><span class="line">10</span><br><span class="line">11</span><br><span class="line">12</span><br><span class="line">13</span><br><span class="line">14</span><br><span class="line">15</span><br><span class="line">16</span><br><span class="line">17</span><br><span class="line">18</span><br><span class="line">19</span><br><span class="line">20</span><br><span class="line">21</span><br><span class="line">22</span><br><span class="line">23</span><br><span class="line">24</span><br><span class="line">25</span><br><span class="line">26</span><br><span class="line">27</span><br><span class="line">28</span><br><span class="line">29</span><br><span class="line">30</span><br><span class="line">31</span><br><span class="line">32</span><br><span class="line">33</span><br><span class="line">34</span><br><span class="line">35</span><br><span class="line">36</span><br><span class="line">37</span><br><span class="line">38</span><br></pre></div></td><td class="code"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><code class="hljs python"><span class="hljs-comment">#!/usr/bin/env python</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># -*- coding: utf-8 -*-</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Date : 2019-03-25 15:23:25</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Author : KK</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Link : http://default.com</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Version : $Id$</span><br><br><span class="hljs-comment">###For Debian10</span><br><br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> PyPDF2<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> os<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> re<br><br><br><span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">def</span> <span class="hljs-title">main</span>():</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment"># find all the pdf files in current directory.</span><br> mypath = os.getcwd()<br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(mypath)<br> pattern = <span class="hljs-string">r&quot;\.pdf$&quot;</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment">#以下文件路径在debian10中适用</span><br> file_names_lst = [mypath + <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;/&#x27;</span>+f <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> f <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> os.listdir(mypath) <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> re.search(pattern, f, re.IGNORECASE) <br> <span class="hljs-keyword">and</span> <span class="hljs-keyword">not</span> re.search(<span class="hljs-string">r&#x27;Merged.pdf&#x27;</span>,f)]<br><br> <span class="hljs-comment"># merge the file.</span><br> opened_file = [<span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(file_name,<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;rb&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> file_name <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> file_names_lst]<br> pdfFM = PyPDF2.PdfFileMerger()<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> file <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> opened_file:<br> pdfFM.append(file)<br><br> <span class="hljs-comment"># output the file.</span><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(mypath + <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;/&#x27;</span> +<span class="hljs-string">&quot;Merged.pdf&quot;</span>, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;wb&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> write_out_file:<br> pdfFM.write(write_out_file)<br><br> <span class="hljs-comment"># close all the input files.</span><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> file <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> opened_file:<br> file.close()<br><span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> __name__ == <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;__main__&#x27;</span>:<br> main()<br></code></pre></div></td></tr></table></figure>

item.title: Debian10备份与恢复mariaDB数据库
Python用request下载金庸小说
百度文字批量识别
item.description: <figure class="highlight"><table><tr><td class="gutter hljs"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><span class="line">1</span><br></pre></div></td><td class="code"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><code class="hljs">百度文字识别<br></code></pre></div></td></tr></table></figure> <figure class="highlight python"><table><tr><td class="gutter hljs"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><span class="line">1</span><br><span class="line">2</span><br><span class="line">3</span><br><span class="line">4</span><br><span class="line">5</span><br><span class="line">6</span><br><span class="line">7</span><br><span class="line">8</span><br><span class="line">9</span><br><span class="line">10</span><br><span class="line">11</span><br><span class="line">12</span><br><span class="line">13</span><br><span class="line">14</span><br><span class="line">15</span><br><span class="line">16</span><br><span class="line">17</span><br><span class="line">18</span><br><span class="line">19</span><br><span class="line">20</span><br><span class="line">21</span><br><span class="line">22</span><br><span class="line">23</span><br><span class="line">24</span><br><span class="line">25</span><br><span class="line">26</span><br><span class="line">27</span><br><span class="line">28</span><br><span class="line">29</span><br><span class="line">30</span><br><span class="line">31</span><br><span class="line">32</span><br><span class="line">33</span><br><span class="line">34</span><br><span class="line">35</span><br><span class="line">36</span><br><span class="line">37</span><br><span class="line">38</span><br><span class="line">39</span><br><span class="line">40</span><br><span class="line">41</span><br><span class="line">42</span><br><span class="line">43</span><br><span class="line">44</span><br><span class="line">45</span><br><span class="line">46</span><br><span class="line">47</span><br><span class="line">48</span><br><span class="line">49</span><br><span class="line">50</span><br><span class="line">51</span><br><span class="line">52</span><br><span class="line">53</span><br><span class="line">54</span><br><span class="line">55</span><br><span class="line">56</span><br><span class="line">57</span><br><span class="line">58</span><br><span class="line">59</span><br><span class="line">60</span><br><span class="line">61</span><br><span class="line">62</span><br><span class="line">63</span><br><span class="line">64</span><br><span class="line">65</span><br><span class="line">66</span><br><span class="line">67</span><br><span class="line">68</span><br><span class="line">69</span><br><span class="line">70</span><br><span class="line">71</span><br><span class="line">72</span><br><span class="line">73</span><br><span class="line">74</span><br><span class="line">75</span><br><span class="line">76</span><br><span class="line">77</span><br></pre></div></td><td class="code"><div class="hljs code-wrapper"><pre><code class="hljs python"><span class="hljs-comment">#!/usr/bin/env python</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># -*- coding: utf-8 -*-</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Date : 2020-10-12 12:47:57</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Author : Your Name (you@example.org)</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Link : http://example.org</span><br><span class="hljs-comment"># @Version : $Id$</span><br><br><span class="hljs-keyword">from</span> aip <span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> AipOcr<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> time<br><span class="hljs-keyword">import</span> os<br><span class="hljs-comment">#获取开始时间</span><br>start = time.time()<br><br><span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot; 你的 APPID AK SK &quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br>APP_ID = <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;百度APPID&#x27;</span><br>API_KEY = <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;百度AK&#x27;</span><br>SECRET_KEY = <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;百度SK&#x27;</span><br><br>client = AipOcr(APP_ID, API_KEY, SECRET_KEY)<br><br><br><span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot; 读取图片 &quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br><span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">def</span> <span class="hljs-title">get_file_content</span>(<span class="hljs-params">filePath</span>):</span><br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(filePath)<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(filePath, <span class="hljs-string">&#x27;rb&#x27;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> fp:<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">return</span> fp.read()<br><br><span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot; 写入文本 &quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br><span class="hljs-function"><span class="hljs-keyword">def</span> <span class="hljs-title">write_on_txt</span>(<span class="hljs-params">content,filePath,linefeed = <span class="hljs-string">&quot;1&quot;</span></span>):</span><br> <span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> content：要写入的内容</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> filePath：要写入文件的路径</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> linefeed ：判断是否换行</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> - 1 为不换行 </span><br><span class="hljs-string"> - 其他 为换行</span><br><span class="hljs-string"> &quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment">#只需要将之前的”w&quot;改为“a&quot;即可，代表追加内容</span><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">with</span> <span class="hljs-built_in">open</span>(filePath,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;a&quot;</span>) <span class="hljs-keyword">as</span> file:<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">try</span>:<br> file.write(content)<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">except</span>:<br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;写入错误&quot;</span>)<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">else</span>:<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> linefeed != <span class="hljs-string">&quot;1&quot;</span>:<br> file.write(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;\n&quot;</span>)<br><br><span class="hljs-comment">#图片路径</span><br>img_path = <span class="hljs-string">r&quot;G:\Pictures\jy\test&quot;</span> <span class="hljs-comment"># 或者&quot;G:/Pictures/jy&quot;</span><br><span class="hljs-comment">#文本路径</span><br>txt_path = <span class="hljs-string">r&quot;G:\Pictures\jy\OCR\图片.txt&quot;</span><br><br>options = &#123;&#125;<br><br><span class="hljs-comment">#遍历所有文件（使用 os.walk 方法）</span><br><span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> root,dirs,files <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> os.walk(img_path):<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> file <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> files:<br> <span class="hljs-comment"># 使用join函数将文件名称和文件所在根目录连接起来</span><br> file_dir = os.path.join(root, file)<br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(file_dir)<br> write_on_txt(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;=============================&quot;</span>,txt_path,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0&quot;</span>)<br> write_on_txt(<span class="hljs-string">&quot;文件名:&quot;</span>+ file_dir,txt_path,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0&quot;</span>)<br> <span class="hljs-comment">#判断是否是图片</span><br> <span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> file_dir[-<span class="hljs-number">4</span>:]==<span class="hljs-string">&quot;.png&quot;</span><span class="hljs-keyword">or</span> file_dir[-<span class="hljs-number">4</span>:]==<span class="hljs-string">&quot;.JPG&quot;</span>:<br> <span class="hljs-comment">#传入图片</span><br> image = get_file_content(file_dir)<br> <span class="hljs-string">&quot;&quot;&quot; 调用通用文字识别, 图片参数为本地图片 &quot;&quot;&quot;</span><br> a = client.basicGeneral(image, options)<br> <span class="hljs-comment"># 查看返回的结果</span><br> <span class="hljs-comment"># print(a[&#x27;words_result&#x27;])</span><br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>()<br> <span class="hljs-keyword">for</span> dic <span class="hljs-keyword">in</span> a[<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;words_result&#x27;</span>]:<br> <span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(dic[<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;words&#x27;</span>])<br> write_on_txt(dic[<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;words&#x27;</span>],txt_path,<span class="hljs-string">&quot;0&quot;</span>)<br><br>end = time.time()<br><span class="hljs-built_in">print</span>(<span class="hljs-string">&#x27;Running time: %1.2f Seconds&#x27;</span>%(end-start))<br><br></code></pre></div></td></tr></table></figure>
